The Teacher

Book a Reading with Sharon

Sharon has spent decades studying, teaching, and living within this ancient system. Her readings go beyond the digital experience — offering a depth of intuitive perception and direct transmission that can only happen in a live session.

Who you are, what you carry, where you are going.

Relationship / Synastry

The cards at play between two people.

Year Ahead / Timing

What the cards reveal for your current year.

13 Card Life Path

A deep dive into your full card signature.
